'''Nur''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Vulpter system/Legends|Vulpter system]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]. The planet had a barren rock surface and had one [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. Nur occupied the fourth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position around the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Vulpter (star)|Vulpter]].<ref name="Wizards" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nur was mentioned in "[[Byss and the Deep Core]], Part 4: Vulpter," the fourth entry in the [[Planet Hoppers]] ''[[Byss and the Deep Core]]'' article series, written by [[Rodney Thompson]] and published on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Wizards.com|website]] on [[April 28]], [[2005]].<ref name="Wizards" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Vulpter [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Nur, in grid square L-10.<ref name="TEA" />
